reason: Round03 introduces a table_note role and restores the visible note/body font hierarchy. It also keeps body-flow grouping and rotated sidebar rendering. Product-quality acceptance is still not claimed because overall text y-coverage and typographic rhythm remain visibly different from the source.

dimensions.evidence: The table note region is classified as table_note and uses a smaller font profile than body/body_flow. The visual hierarchy is restored, but the translated note remains visually heavier than the English source note.
Body-flow grouping removes large blank holes inside each paragraph box, but Chinese text still occupies a shorter y span than the English source.
Active body paragraphs flow as one region with paragraph separators; blank space is concentrated near the end of the article.
End-of-article blank space is not treated as the same failure class as excessive gaps between active paragraphs.
The active red sidebar title is rendered as rotated text instead of stacked one-character lines. Short inactive labels are still constrained by narrow source slots.
Final source-vs-output visual acceptance remains blocked by y-span and rhythm differences.
